hero.subtitle: Profiline GM25 Dual Action Polisher
hero.desc: Engineered for professionals. Extreme cutting power combined with perfect balance for 8-hour shifts.

trust.item1Tooltip: Designed and assembled in our state-of-the-art European facility.
trust.item2Tooltip: Meets strict European health, safety, and environmental protection standards.
trust.item3Tooltip: Comprehensive coverage for professional daily use, including parts and labor.
trust.item4Tooltip: Fast and reliable shipping to all European Union countries.
trust.item5Tooltip: Full range of replacement parts and dedicated professional support.

gallery.title: See the GM25 Up Close
gallery.desc: Explore every detail of the Profiline GM25 from multiple angles.

specs.title: Raw Power. Refined Control.
specs.desc: The GM25 is built with uncompromising components to deliver consistent results on the toughest clear coats.
specs.spec1Desc: Relentless torque that won't bog down under pressure.
specs.spec2Desc: Cover more surface area faster with extreme cutting power.
specs.spec3Desc: Optimized airflow keeps the machine and pad cool during extended use.
specs.spec4Desc: Variable speed dial from 2200 to 5800 OPM for precise control.

performance.desc1: We know that 8-hour shifts demand ergonomic perfection. The GM25 features a CNC-machined counterweight system that virtually eliminates vibration, reducing operator fatigue and preventing micro-marring on delicate finishes.
performance.list1: Rubberized grip zones for maximum control
performance.desc2: The massive 25mm orbital throw combined with our proprietary 1200W motor means you can remove deep defects faster than ever before. It maintains pad rotation even on complex curves and under heavy pressure.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the warranty period for the Profiline GM25?
faq.a1: The GM25 comes with a comprehensive 2-year warranty covering material and workmanship defects across all European markets.
faq.a2: The GM25 includes both a 125mm (5-inch) and a 150mm (6-inch) backing plate in the box.
faq.a3: While engineered for professionals, the dual-action mechanism makes it extremely safe and easy to use, even for beginners, minimizing the risk of burning through the clear coat.
faq.a4: The machine features a massive 25mm orbital throw — one of the largest on the market — for faster correction on large panels.
faq.q5: How can I become a distributor?
faq.a5: Fill out the partner form below with your company details, and our team will review your application and respond within 48 hours.
faq.a6: Yes, we maintain a complete inventory of replacement parts including carbon brushes, backing plates, power cords, and all internal components.

b2b.title: Partner with Profiline
b2b.desc: We are expanding our European distribution network. If you represent a detailing academy, a wholesale distributor, or a premium retail outlet, we want to hear from you.
b2b.point1Desc: Secure your region with our protected distribution agreements.
b2b.point2Desc: Access to high-end media assets, POS materials, and training.
b2b.point3Desc: Highly competitive margins for volume partners.
b2b.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your distribution network...
